name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Feature area**
Which part of Wave Client is affected? (check all that apply)
- [ ] Requests & Protocols (HTTP / WebSocket / SSE)
- [ ] Collections
- [ ] Environments
- [ ] Variables
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Validations
- [ ] Wave Store (cookies, auth, proxies, certs)
- [ ] Flows
- [ ] Test Lab / Test Suites
- [ ] Reporting
- [ ] Settings (storage, encryption, AI)
- [ ] AI / Wave Arena
- [ ] Other (describe below)

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Environment (please complete the following information):**
- App: [VS Code extension / Web app]
- Wave Client version: [e.g. 1.2.0]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
- VS Code version (if using the extension): [e.g. 1.99.0]
- Browser (if using the web app): [e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17]

**HAR file (optional)**
If the bug involves a request, response, or flow, attaching a HAR capture helps us
reproduce it. Drag and drop the `.har` file into this issue to attach it.
> Tip: remove or redact any secrets (tokens, cookies, passwords) before uploading.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
